hooks.command: FILE=$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH; case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.css) npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true;; *.cs) dotnet format --include "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true;; esac
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND" | grep -qE 'git push.*(origin )?main'; then echo 'AI guard: direct push to main is blocked. Raise a PR against dev instead.' && exit 2; fi
